data.title: Trump To Sign Executive Order Tomorrow
data.description: According to BlockBeats, U.S. President Donald Trump is scheduled to sign an executive order tomorrow at 3 a.m. UTC+8.

data.title: Ethereum Foundation Board of Directors Announces New Members
data.description: According to the official website of the Ethereum Foundation, Hsiao-Wei Wang will join the board of directors of the Ethereum Foundation. The current board members include: Aya Miyaguchi (Chairman), Vitalik Buterin (Founder), Patrick Storchenegger (Swiss Council Member) and Hsiao-Wei Wang (Co-Executive Director).

data.title: SOL's latest proposal SIMD-0228 has a support rate of 12.4%, and the income will shrink if it is pledged
data.description:
Odaily Planet Daily News According to user @Rocky_Bitcoin on the X platform, according to the latest voting statistics, the support rate of SOL's SIMD-0228 proposal has reached 12.4%, and the opposition rate is 3.4%. Judging from the current situation, the proposal is likely to pass, and it is expected that this change will have a greater impact in the short term.
However, after the SIMD-0228 proposal is passed, users who pledge SOL face the risk of shrinking returns. In order to avoid losses, some pledged users may choose to unstake and withdraw coins. Although this change may cause market fluctuations in the short term, in the long run, the proposal aims to solve the inflation problem of SOL, which will help improve the overall health and sustainability of the network.

data.title: Canada's new Prime Minister Mark Carney has criticized Bitcoin, calling it "deeply flawed"
data.description: Odaily Planet Daily News The Liberal Party of Canada announced that Mark Carney has been elected as the new prime minister, replacing Justin Trudeau. Carney was once the governor of the Bank of Canada and a critic of Bitcoin. On March 2, 2018, he said that the fixed supply of Bitcoin led to "serious defects" and warned that "recreating a virtual global gold standard would be a crime of monetary amnesia." Carney also pointed out that Bitcoin and cryptocurrencies have proven to be "poor short-term value storage means", citing Bitcoin volatility as an example, pointing out that if you borrow Bitcoin to pay for living expenses, you may suffer a huge loss. In the same paper, he mentioned that he supports central bank digital currencies, believing that they can expand banking services and help fight terrorism and economic crime. Nevertheless, Carney served on the board of directors of payment company Stripe from 2021 to 2025, and the company implemented a series of crypto payment solutions between 2022 and 2024. In international affairs, Carney plans to fight back against the tariff policy of the Trump administration of the United States and said that Canada "will never be part of the United States in any way." (Cointeklegraph)

data.title: Guangzhou Advances AI Initiatives Across Key Industries
data.description: According to PANews, Guangzhou is actively advancing its artificial intelligence initiatives in line with the directives of the city's municipal government. The city is establishing an industrial office dedicated to promoting AI-related work. Leveraging Guangzhou's rich application scenarios, the focus will be on industries with comparative advantages and growth potential, such as life health, intelligent transportation, energy and environmental protection, and smart manufacturing. The city aims to create a convenient, high-quality, and inclusive AI+ industry application technology service base to gather various industry ecosystem partners. This initiative seeks to accelerate the implementation of AI+ industry applications in Guangzhou, encouraging demonstration applications to drive the industrialization of AI technology and the intelligent development of industries.

data.title: Suspicious Transactions Detected on Arbitrum Network
data.description: According to Foresight News, CertiK Alert has identified several suspicious transactions on the Arbitrum network. These transactions were conducted by the address 0x97d8170e04771826a31c4c9b81e9f9191a1c8613. It is suspected that the individual behind these transactions exploited a vulnerability allowing arbitrary calls to bypass signature verification. This exploit reportedly enabled the theft of approximately $140,000 from multiple unverified exchange adapter contracts.

data.title: The crypto market fell across the board, with BTC hitting a low of $80,000 and ETH falling more than 6%
data.description:
Odaily Planet Daily News On March 10, according to SoSoValue data, the crypto market sector fell across the board, with a 24-hour decline of about 4% to 10%. Bitcoin (BTC) fell 4.73%, hitting the lowest level of $80,000, and Ethereum (ETH) fell 6.35%, once falling below $2,000. In addition, in the Trump Crypto Strategic Reserve sector, XRP, Solana (SOL), and Cardano (ADA) fell 6.41%, 7.10%, and 7.53%, respectively.
In other sectors, the CeFi sector fell 4.98% in 24 hours. Within the sector, Binance coin (BNB) and Bitget token (BGB) fell 5.12% and 5.95% respectively; the PayFi sector fell 6.22%, the Layer1 sector fell 6.36%, the Layer2 sector fell 7.06%, and the DeFi sector fell 7.66%. Within the sector, Ethena (ENA) was relatively strong, up 0.34%; the Meme sector fell 9.12%, and the market value of most tokens in the sector retreated to the level of November 2024.

data.title: Canada’s new prime minister once said Bitcoin had ‘serious deficiencies’
data.description:
Canada’s new prime minister, Mark Carney, once said recreating a virtual global gold standard like Bitcoin “would be a criminal act of monetary amnesia.”

data.title: Dogecoin Plunges 9% But Top Analyst Believes Meme Coin Could Stage A 'Strong' Rebound In Case This Happens
data.description:
Influential cryptocurrency analyst Ali Martinez anticipated a significant rebound for Dogecoin (CRYPTO: DOGE) despite the market slump on Sunday.

source: https://www.benzinga.com/markets/cryptocurrency/25/03/44212481/dogecoin-plunges-9-but-top-analyst-believes-meme-coin-could-stage-a-strong-rebound-in-case?utm_source=cryptopanic.com&utm_campaign=partner_feed&utm_medium=partner_feed&utm_content=site

data.title: A whale with 65,675 ETH faces liquidation at a price of $1,931.83
data.description: Odaily Planet Daily News According to Lockonchain, a whale's 65,675 ETH (about $135.8 million) on the Maker platform is about to face liquidation. The current health value of the account is only 1.05, and the liquidation price is $1,931.83.
